text: You walked around the city and found your way.
Now you open the door and you are inside your home.

Kitchen

There is a sofa in the living room.
There is a bed in the bedroom.
There are two windows in the room.
There are three chairs in the kitchen.
Hello Gabriela. Your home is beautiful. Is this the living room?
Yes, this is the living room. There is a sofa here, and there are two windows.
Very nice and bright. Is there a kitchen too?
Yes, the kitchen is here. There is a table and there are three chairs.
And where is your bedroom?
It is at the end. There is a bed and a big window. The bathroom is near it.
Is there a kitchen in your home?
There is no balcony, but it is cozy.

Hello, welcome to my home. This is my living room. There is a big sofa here, and there is a small table next to it. There are two windows, so the room is very bright. On the left there is the kitchen. There is a new fridge and a small table for breakfast. There are three chairs around the table. My bedroom is at the end. There is a comfortable bed and a large window with a nice view. There is one bathroom near the bedroom. I really love my home. It is small, but it is cozy and quiet.

Hi Gabriela, this is Daniel. I want to tell you about my new apartment. It is on the fourth floor. There is a large living room with a green sofa and a television. There are two bedrooms, so my brother has his own room now. There is only one bathroom, but it is big. In the kitchen there is a new stove and there are many cabinets for our things. There is no balcony, but there is a beautiful window in the living room. Come and visit me soon. There is always coffee for friends here.

First, Gabriela opened the door and welcomed her guest inside. Then she showed the living room with the sofa and the windows. Next, they walked to the kitchen and the bedroom. After that, she showed the small bathroom near the bedroom. Finally, they sat on the sofa and talked about the home.
